_comment: Pinned glottolog-cldf acquisition config. fetch-glottolog.mjs downloads and SHA-256-verifies each pinned CLDF file at the pinned commit. languages.csv carries name/level/ISO; values.csv carries the `classification` parameter (root-first ancestor path of glottocodes) from which the tree is reconstructed — this release's languages.csv has no Parent_ID column, so the tree lives in values.csv (see specs/036-glottolog-catalog research.md D1/D2).
notice: Glottolog 5.3 by Hammarström, Harald & Forkel, Robert & Haspelmath, Martin & Bank, Sebastian. Leipzig: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology. https://glottolog.org (CC-BY-4.0)
